get.summary: Retrieve a specific DebtPosition
Retrieved a specific DebtPosition generate and download ZIP of unpaid/unpayable installment of notices

200.description: ZIP file containing PDF of notices

204.description: No Content - No UNPAID or UNPAYABLE installments found

403.description: Forbidden - No installment in UNPAID state

500.description: Internal Server Error - Error during PDF generation or processing

orgLogo.description: Base64 encoded logo of the organization

dictionary.description: Dictionary of localized messages for spontaneous form fields. The map has three levels of nesting: 1. First level: language code (e.g. "EN") 2. Second level: field name (e.g. "payment_field") 3. Third level: attribute name and message for that field (e.g. "label", "error", "help")  Example: {   "EN": {     "payment_field": {       "label": "Payment description",       "error": "Specify the payment description",       "help": "Specify the payment description"     }   } }

footerPrivacyInfoUrl.description: URL for privacy information in the footer

footerGDPRUrl.description: URL for GDPR information in the footer

footerTermsCondUrl.description: URL for terms and conditions in the footer

footerAccessibilityUrl.description: URL for accessibility information in the footer

canManageUsers.description: Indicates if the user can manage other users
